description: You are a machine learning engineer at an AI research startup. The custom Byte-Pair Encoding (BPE) tokenizer used for your specialized Large Language Model is failing on multi-lingual datasets. Fix the tokenizer at /home/ga/workspace/tokenizer/ by resolving issues with whitespace discarding, CJK character clumping, sub-optimal merges, regex metacharacter crashes, and emoji decoding errors until the included test suite passes.
